a: An object that provides methods to obtain information about running applications.

Indicates whether the given path identifies an existent file.

Returns a dictionary with the properties of a given IOKit object.
Provides gestalt information that corresponds to the given selector.
Provides the localized standard string in the installation package for the current locale for a given key.
